source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］

cards.english: My name is Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Mr. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2
cards.english: [The Tooth Fairy]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: Peppa同George食緊佢哋至愛嘅食物
cards.jyutping: tung4 sik6 gan2 keoi5 dei6 zi3 oi3 ge3 sik6 mat6
cards.english: Peppa and George are eating their favorite food

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: zau6 hai6 ji3 daai6 lei6 fan2 laa3
cards.english: Which is spaghetti

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 sik6 dak1 hou2 daai6 sing1 aa3
cards.english: You are eating very loudly

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: sik6 jyun4 laa3
cards.english: Finished eating!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 zung1 jyu1 ji5 gan1 cing1 zing6 laa3
cards.english: Now it's finally quiet!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: hai6 me1 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: What is it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: hai6 jat1 zek3 ngaa4 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: It's a tooth!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: zek3 ngaa4 hai2 bin1 dou6 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: Where did the tooth come from?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: bat1 jyu4 nei5 zi6 gei2 ziu3 haa6 geng3 aa1
cards.english: Peppa, why don't you look in the mirror yourself?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: jyun4 loi4 hai6 ngo5 zek3 ngaa4
cards.english: Oh, it's my tooth!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dit3 zo2 ceot1 lei4 aa3
cards.english: It fell out!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1
cards.english: Don't worry, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 佢只係乳齒嚟㗎啫，遲早都會甩㗎
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zi2 hai6 jyu5 ci2 lai4 gaa4 ze1 ci4 zou2 dou1 wui6 lat1 gaa4
cards.english: It's just a baby tooth, it'll fall out sooner or later anyway.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 我會唔會有新牙㗎？媽咪
cards.jyutping: ngo5 wui6 m4 wui6 jau5 san1 ngaa4 gaa4 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Will I get new teeth, Mummy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1 nei5 wui6 jau5 gaa4
cards.english: Don't worry, you will, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 亦即係話牙齒仙子好快會嚟揾你㗎喇
cards.jyutping: jik6 zik1 hai6 waa6 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 hou2 faai3 wui6 lai4 wan2 nei5 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Which means the tooth fairy will be visiting you soon.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: nei5 waa6 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2
cards.english: You mean the tooth fairy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: mou5 co3 hai6 aa3
cards.english: That's right.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 只要你今晚將隻牙放喺枕頭底
cards.jyutping: zi2 jiu3 nei5 gam1 maan5 zoeng1 zek3 ngaa4 fong3 hai2 zam2 tau4 dai2
cards.english: If you put your tooth under your pillow tonight,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 zau6 wui6 lai4 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: the tooth fairy will come.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 wui6 ling1 zau2 zek3 ngaa4
cards.english: The tooth fairy will take the tooth,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ji4 zok3 wai4 gaau1 wun6 ne1
cards.english: and in exchange,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 佢就會放低一個發光嘅金幣
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 wui6 fong3 dai1 jat1 go3 faat3 gwong1 ge3 gam1 bai6
cards.english: she'll leave a shiny gold coin.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 我大過咗都想做牙齒仙子啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 daai6 gwo3 zo2 dou1 soeng2 zou6 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 aa3
cards.english: I'm too old, but I still want to be a tooth fairy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 噉你大過之後想做啲咩啊？George
cards.jyutping: gam2 nei5 daai6 gwo3 zi1 hau6 soeng2 zou6 di1 me1 aa3
cards.english: So, what do you want to be when you grow up, George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: Dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: soeng2 zou6 hung2 lung4 aa1
cards.english: You want to be a dinosaur?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: lai4 aa3 gau3 zung1 fan3 gaau3 laa3
cards.english: Come on, George, it's time for bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 我哋今晚要見到牙齒仙子啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 gam1 maan5 jiu3 gin3 dou2 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 aa3
cards.english: We need to see the tooth fairy tonight.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 喺瞓覺之前，Peppa同George要擦牙先
cards.jyutping: hai2 fan3 gaau3 zi1 cin4 tung4 jiu3 caat3 ngaa4 sin1
cards.english: Before sleeping, Peppa and George need to brush their teeth first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zou6 gan2 me1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa, what are you doing?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai2 dou6 caat3 gan2 ngo5 zek3 ngaa4
cards.english: I'm brushing my tooth.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 等佢乾淨啲畀牙齒仙子拎走啊
cards.jyutping: dang2 keoi5 gon1 zeng6 di1 bei2 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 ling1 zau2 aa3
cards.english: To make it cleaner for the tooth fairy to take away.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: hou2 faai3 gam2 paa4 zo2 soeng5 cong4
cards.english: Peppa quickly climbed into bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 佢將甩咗嗰隻牙放喺枕頭底
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zoeng1 lat1 zo2 go2 zek3 ngaa4 fong3 hai2 zam2 tau4 dai2
cards.english: She put the tooth that fell out under her pillow.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: dang2 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 lai4 ling1 zau2
cards.english: Waiting for the tooth fairy to come and take it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 laa3
cards.english: Good night, Peppa and George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 zou2 tau2 laa3 de1 dei6 zou2 tau2
cards.english: Good night, Mommy and Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 laa3 ngo5 loeng5 go3 bou2 bui3
cards.english: Good night, my two little darlings.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 gam1 maan5 m4 fan3 gaa4
cards.english: George, we're not going to sleep tonight.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 不如我哋一齊唔好瞓住
cards.jyutping: bat1 jyu4 ngo5 dei6 jat1 cai4 m4 hou2 fan3 zyu6
cards.english: How about we stay awake together?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: dang2 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 lai4 aa1
cards.english: Waiting for the tooth fairy to come.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 hou2 ci4 aa3
cards.english: This tooth fairy is very late.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 牙齒仙子過咗好耐都未嚟到喎
cards.jyutping: ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 gwo3 zo2 hou2 noi6 dou1 mei6 lai4 dou3 wo3
cards.english: The tooth fairy hasn't come for a long time.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 nei5 hai2 bin1 dou6 aa3
cards.english: Where are you, tooth fairy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ni1 di1 hai6 me1 sing1 lai4 gaa4 ne1
cards.english: What is this sound?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: m4 tung1 hai6 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2
cards.english: Could it be the tooth fairy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: nei5 ting3 dou3 jau5 seng1 maa1
cards.english: George, do you hear a sound?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: juk1
cards.english: Oh, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 哦，原來啲聲音係嚟自George㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo4 jyun4 loi4 di1 sing1 jam1 hai6 lai4 zi6 gaa4
cards.english: Oh, so the sounds are coming from George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 taai3 gui6 so2 ji5 fan3 zoek6 zo2 laa3
cards.english: He's too tired, so he fell asleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: George因為太細喇，所以佢唔瞓唔得㗎
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 taai3 sai3 laa3 so2 ji5 keoi5 m4 fan3 m4 dak1 gaa4
cards.english: George is too young, so he has to sleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: daan6 ngo5 m4 hai6 aa3
cards.english: But I'm not.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 我一定要等到牙齒仙子嚟為止先瞓啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jat1 ding6 jiu3 dang2 dou3 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 lai4 wai4 zi2 sin1 fan3 aa3
cards.english: I have to wait until the tooth fairy comes before I sleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zyut6 deoi3 m4 wui6 fan3 zoek6 gaa4
cards.english: I definitely won't fall asleep...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 lai4 dou3 laa3 wo3
cards.english: The tooth fairy has arrived.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 fan3 zoek6 zo2
cards.english: But Peppa fell asleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: hou2 maa1
cards.english: Peppa, are you okay?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 你想用你隻牙換呢一個金幣嗎？
cards.jyutping: nei5 soeng2 jung6 nei5 zek3 ngaa4 wun6 ne1 jat1 go3 gam1 bai6 maa1
cards.english: Do you want to trade your tooth for this gold coin?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: zek3 ngaa4 zan1 hai6 hou2 gon1 zeng6 aa3
cards.english: The tooth is very clean.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: do1 ze6 nei5 aa3 zou2 tau2 laa3
cards.english: Thank you, Peppa, good night.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: hei2 san1 laa1 tin1 gwong1 laa3
cards.english: Peppa, George, wake up, it's morning.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: me1 waa6
cards.english: What?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ming4 ming4 mou5 fan3 gaau3 gaa4
cards.english: But I didn't sleep at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 jau5 lai4 dou3 maa1
cards.english: Did the Tooth Fairy come?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: mou5 aa3
cards.english: No.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 不如睇下你個枕頭底吖
cards.jyutping: bat1 jyu4 tai2 haa6 nei5 go3 zam2 tau4 dai2 aa1
cards.english: Why don't you check under your pillow?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: Peppa你睇下，牙齒仙子嚟過喇
cards.jyutping: nei5 tai2 haa6 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 lai4 gwo3 laa3
cards.english: Peppa, look, the Tooth Fairy came!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 bei2 zo2 go3 gam1 bai6 nei5 aa3
cards.english: She gave you a gold coin.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.jyutping: tai2 lai4 nei5 cam4 maan5 fan3 zoek6 zo2 wo3
cards.english: Looks like you fell asleep last night.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 我可能尋晚瞓咗一陣咁多啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ho2 nang4 cam4 maan5 fan3 zo2 jat1 zan6 gam3 do1 laa1
cards.english: I might have dozed off for a little while last night.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 不過下一次我一定唔會瞓着㗎喇
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 haa6 jat1 ci3 ngo5 jat1 ding6 m4 wui6 fan3 zoek6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: But next time, I definitely won't fall asleep!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E22 Tooth Fairy［牙齒仙子］
cards.characters: 噉我就會見到牙齒仙子喇
cards.jyutping: gam2 ngo5 zau6 wui6 gin3 dou2 ngaa4 ci2 sin1 zi2 laa3
cards.english: Then I will see the Tooth Fairy.
